[[File:Morrigan's javelin detail.png|left|150px]]
'''Morrigan's javelin''' is a ranged throwing weapon requiring level 78 [[Ranged]] to wield. It is part of [[Morrigan's equipment]], a set of [[Ancient Warriors' equipment]].

On permanent [[Deadman Mode]] worlds, it is dropped by any monster found in the [[Wilderness]] as part of a [[Deadman Mode#Global loot table|global loot table]], the chance being relative to the combat level of the monster. They can also be obtained from looting [[Deadman's chest (scenery)|Deadman's chests]] and as a drop from [[breach monster]]s in [[Deadman: Annihilation]].

Unlike other [[javelin]]s, they cannot be used with [[ballista]]e and are a standalone weapon. They may also be retrieved with [[Ava's device]]s.

==Special attack==
[[File:Phantom Strike.gif|thumb|260px|A player performing Morrigan's javelin special attack.]]
Morrigan's javelin has a [[special attack]], ''Phantom Strike'', that consumes 50% of the player's [[special attack energy]] and applies a damage over time effect to the opponent after the special attack is performed. This special attack has no effect on [[NPC]]s.

Every tick (0.6 seconds) after the special attack is performed, the opponent will take an additional 10 hitpoints of damage until 75% of the damage dealt by the special attack has been delivered (for example, if hitting for 40 damage, the target will bleed for 3 hits of 10). When this occurs, the target will receive a message in their chatbox stating "''You start to bleed as a result of the javelin strike.''" Subsequent damage will result in the chatbox stating "''You continue to bleed as a result of the javelin strike.''"
